pipes.pipe.pipetargethttpparameters.CfnA: These are custom parameter to be used when the target is an API Gateway REST APIs or EventBridge ApiDestinations.

pipes.pipe.pipetargethttpparameters.Head.Description: The headers that need to be sent as part of request invoking the API Gateway REST API or EventBridge ApiDestination.

pipes.pipe.pipetargethttpparameters.Path.Description: The path parameter values to be used to populate API Gateway REST API or EventBridge ApiDestination path wildcards ("*").

pipes.pipe.pipetargethttpparameters.Quer.Description: The query string keys/values that need to be sent as part of request invoking the API Gateway REST API or EventBridge ApiDestination.
